input.sql: MERGE INTO t_user AS tgt USING (SELECT 1 AS user_id, 'test_user' AS user_name, '2020-01-01' AS creation_date) AS src ON (tgt.user_id = src.user_id AND tgt.user_name = src.user_name) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.creation_date = src.creation_date WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (user_id, creation_date) VALUES (src.user_id, src.creation_date);

output.sql: MERGE INTO t_user AS tgt USING (SELECT 1 AS user_id, 'o07WOpLlazifLKU747nd8w==' AS user_name, '2020-01-01' AS creation_date) AS src ON (tgt.user_id = src.user_id AND tgt.[user_name_cipher] = src.user_name) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.creation_date = src.creation_date WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (user_id, creation_date, [user_name_cipher]) VALUES (src.user_id, src.creation_date, src.user_name);
